name: Dallas Valley Goldmine - Fort Worth
description_short: Dallas Valley Goldmine is a precious metals and jewelry buyer with 12 Texas locations operating by private appointment only. They purchase gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, and estate jewelry.
description_long:
Dallas Valley Goldmine operates as a specialized precious metals and jewelry buyer with an established presence across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex and surrounding Texas cities. The company has expanded to 12 locations throughout Texas, including multiple Fort Worth offices, positioning itself as a regional player in the gold-buying market. Founded on principles of safety and confidentiality, the company conducts all transactions through private, by-appointment-only meetings rather than walk-in retail operations.

The company purchases a broad range of precious metal items including gold jewelry (necklaces, rings, bracelets, earrings), dental gold and crowns, silver items (sterling silverware and tea sets), platinum, diamonds, gold and silver coins, and estate jewelry collections. Transactions are conducted on a one-on-one basis, and the company emphasizes the private and secure nature of the buying process. They offer flexible appointment scheduling across their 12 locations, with online appointment booking and mobile home-visit options for seniors over 60 or individuals with disabilities through their Gold Buyer Concierge program.

Dallas Valley Goldmine distinguishes itself through several operational features: A+ Better Business Bureau rating, a 4.9 out of 5 average customer rating, mobile in-home buying services for qualifying customers, and appointment-based operations designed to provide privacy and security. The company markets itself specifically to individuals seeking confidential, personalized transactions without the typical pawn shop retail experience. Their online presence includes testimonials and they maintain multiple locations to serve a wide geographic area.

As a precious metals buyer rather than a full-service pawn shop, Dallas Valley Goldmine operates in a narrower niche focused on buying rather than lending or pawning. Customers should expect transaction-based relationships rather than ongoing credit or loan services. The appointment-only model may be less convenient for those seeking immediate, walk-in service, though it aligns with the company's stated security and privacy priorities.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: A+ Better Business Bureau rating with established credibility
4.9 out of 5 average customer rating based on documented reviews
12 locations across Texas for convenient service access
Mobile in-home buying service available for seniors 60+ and disabled individuals
Private, one-on-one appointment-based transactions for confidentiality
Purchases diverse precious metal items including dental gold, coins, estate jewelry, and platinum
Online appointment scheduling system with flexible time slots (8am-6:30pm)
cons: Appointment-only model eliminates same-day walk-in service availability
Limited transparency on pricing methodology or gold valuation process on website
No information provided about instant cash payout availability or transaction timelines
Website contains multiple address inconsistencies (Mercantile Plaza listed differently, different Fort Worth addresses across pages)
No explicit disclosure of fees, commissions, or deductions from offered prices
best_for: Seniors over 60 seeking private, convenient gold-selling with in-home service options
Individuals with estate jewelry collections wanting confidential bulk transactions
People with disabilities preferring personalized one-on-one appointment service
Sellers prioritizing privacy and security over immediate walk-in convenience
diagnosis: Dallas Valley Goldmine is best suited for individuals wanting to sell precious metals and jewelry through a private, appointment-based process rather than traditional pawn shop transactions. The main caveat is the appointment-only model eliminates walk-in convenience, and the website lacks transparency about pricing formulas and payment terms.
services: Gold jewelry buying (necklaces, rings, bracelets, earrings)
Dental gold and gold crown purchases
Silver item buying (sterling silverware, tea sets)
Private by-appointment transactions at 12 regional locations
Mobile in-home buying service for seniors 60+ and disabled individuals
Gold Buyer Concierge program for special populations
Online appointment scheduling and booking system
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4500 Mercantile Plaza Suite 300, Fort Worth, TX 76137
